steps.title: Find the total weight lost
steps.content:
The bear started at 515 pounds and ended at 490 pounds.
$$515 - 490 = 25 \text{ pounds}$$

steps.title: Divide weight lost by the daily loss rate
steps.content:
At a rate of 0.5 pounds per day, the number of days needed to lose 25 pounds is:
$$\text{days} = \frac{25}{0.5} = \frac{25}{\frac{1}{2}} = 25 \times 2 = 50$$
The black bear weighed 490 pounds 50 days after entering hibernation.
